text_block_list.name: Little Sister A
text_block_list.text: C'mon, Dad! Hurry up! Her race is about to start!

text_block_list.name: Ines's Father
text_block_list.text:
Slow down, Cassie! Your hat's gonna fly off if you
run like that!

text_block_list.name: Flashy Part-Timer
text_block_list.text:
Damn, place is packed. Looks like Ines is running
in another super big-deal race, huh?

text_block_list.name: Girl with False Eyelashes
text_block_list.text:
Guess so. But knowing her, she's gonna be just
fine.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Hey, can I ask you something?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
What do you think's the difference between me
and Ryan?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I think on her question for a moment. A Mejiro on
the one hand, and on the other... my trainee.
choice_data_list: Well, she's got more muscle than you.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: ...Well, yeah.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Sure. That's true.
choice_data_list: You bring different emotions to your races.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... I think you're right. Ryan's trying to carry
the whole Mejiro family, just like McQueen is.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: But I'm just running because I want to run.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I don't have some kind of big goal like that. I just
run based on how I feel.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
...So how come you've kept supporting me all this
time?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: I work hard?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She works hard at school, at home, at work, and
on the track too.
choice_data_list:
I like the way you run because you always give
it your all.

I like the way you run because you always give
it your all.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Oh! I think you said something like that before,
actually.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
You said you like seeing me enjoy running. So,
ever since then, you've—
choice_data_list: I think everyone feels that way.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
You said you like seeing me enjoy running. So,
ever since then, you've—
choice_data_list: I think everyone feels that way.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Everyone?
choice_data_list: We all want to dream with you.
We all want to dream with you.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: You want to dream... with me. Huh.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: A lot! That was a great answer!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I'm heading to the paddock! I'll give you a taste
of what's to come—the joy of victory, shared with
me!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
(I understand now, Ryan. The reason you told me
I don't have to bear the burden.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Fans
text_block_list.text:
McQueeen! Use this race to showcase the pride of
the Mejiro family! We simply can't wait to witness
your victory!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
(The hopes people are pinning on McQueen and
Ryan, the stuff their fans are shouting... It's all a
bit different from what I get from my fans.)

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
(They're expected to be a certain way, and
people want them to do certain things. But...)

text_block_list.name: Ines Fans
text_block_list.text:
You can do it, Big Sis!
Gooooo, Ines!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
My fans aren't so much pinning their expectations
on me... it's more like they're just encouraging me.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Which means I don't have to burden myself. My
fans and I have been dreaming together from the
start.
